creator: roelof@eboa.com
text:
the libmcrypt was bumped from the 2.2.6, which I had in the
distfiles/, to 2.2.7. In itself a good thing if not for the
lib having been moved into the old/ subdir on mcrypt.hellug.gr.

Also the recent version is something like 4.7.x

Fix: 

append old/ to the mastersite. The lib was not found in any other
site during make install. Haven't checked those.
How-To-Repeat: 
make install
